name: product-ops
description: Product operations harness: a 6-stage execution SOP for small teams (1-2 PMs, 3-4 devs) plus 77 PM skills + 36 chained slash commands across discovery, strategy, execution, market research, GTM, marketing/growth, data analytics, AI-PM, career, and toolkit. Combines the original Scrut-tested SOP with phuryn/pm-skills (MIT, Pawel Huryn) and 12 gap-fill skills distilled from Lenny Rachitsky, Roman Pichler, and Institute of Product Leadership canonical posts.
